questions.question_text: Which loop is best used when the number of iterations is known in advance?
Which loop executes the code block at least once before checking the condition?
The while loop checks the condition before executing the loop body.
Which of the following loops are entry-controlled loops?
Which loop is mainly used to iterate through arrays and collections?
Enhanced for loop is also called the for-each loop.
Which of the following are components of a for loop?
What will be the output? for(int i = 1; i <= 3; i++){ System.out.print(i); }
Which keyword is used to exit a switch case in Java?
Switch statements can replace multiple if-else conditions when checking the same variable.

What is a method in Java?
options: A block of code used to perform a specific task
questions.correct_answer: A block of code used to perform a specific task

questions.question_text: println() and nextInt() are examples of built-in methods.
Which of the following are examples of built-in methods in Java?
A method that accepts parameters and returns a value is called:
options: Method with parameters and return value
Method with parameters and no return value
Method with no parameters and return value
Method with no parameters and no return value
questions.correct_answer: Method with parameters and return value

questions.question_text: A method that accepts parameters but does not return any value is called a method with parameters and no return value.
Which of the following are types of methods based on parameters and return type?
options: Method with parameters and return value
Method with parameters and no return value
Method with no parameters but return value
Method with no parameters and no return value
correct_answers: Method with parameters and return value
Method with parameters and no return value
Method with no parameters but return value
Method with no parameters and no return value

questions.question_text: Which keyword is used in Java to send a value back from a method?
Static methods can be called using the class name without creating an object.
